name: Scarabaeidae
diagnosis: The family Scarabaeidae as currently defined consists of over 30,000 species of beetles worldwide, often called scarabs or scarab beetles. The classification of this family is fairly unstable, with numerous competing theories, and new proposals appearing quite often. Many of the subfamilies listed here probably will not be recognized very much longer, as they will likely be reduced in status below subfamily rank, or elevated to family status (the latter is most likely, e.g., with the...

genus_notes.popillia: Popillia is a genus of scarab beetles.
genus_notes.cotinis: Cotinis is a genus of scarab beetles in the subfamily Cetoniinae found throughout North and South America; at least two species (Cotinis mutabilis and Cotinis nitida) are common pests.
genus_notes.pelidnota: Pelidnota is a genus of beetles belonging to the Scarabaeidae family....
genus_notes.cyclocephala: Cyclocephala is a genus of scarab beetles from the subfamily Dynastinae (Coleoptera, Scarabaeidae).
genus_notes.euphoria: Euphoria is a genus of scarab beetles in the subfamily Cetoniinae, the flower or fruit chafers.
genus_notes.maladera: Maladera is a genus in the beetle family Scarabaeidae, containing species such as Maladera insanabilis and Maladera castanea.
genus_notes.dynastes: Dynastes is a genus of large beetles belonging to the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.osmoderma: Osmoderma is a genus of beetle in family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.onthophagus: Onthophagus is a genus of dung beetles in the Onthophagini tribe of the wider scarab beetle family, Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.phanaeus: Phanaeus is a genus of Scarabaeidae or scarab beetles in the superfamily Scarabaeoidea.
genus_notes.strigoderma: Strigoderma is a genus of shining leaf chafers in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.dichotomius: Dichotomius is a genus of Scarabaeidae or scarab beetles in the superfamily Scarabaeoidea.
genus_notes.valgus: Valgus is a genus of beetles.
genus_notes.copris: Copris is a genus of dung beetles in the tribe Coprini (subfamily Scarabaeinae) of the scarab family.
genus_notes.anomala: Anomala is a genus of shining leaf chafers in the family of beetles known as Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.trichiotinus: Trichiotinus is a genus of fruit and flower chafers in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.callistethus: Callistethus is a genus of shining leaf chafers in the beetle family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.cotalpa: Cotalpa is a genus of beetle in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.hoplia: Hoplia is a genus of scarabaeid beetle belonging to the subfamily Melolonthinae.
genus_notes.phyllophaga: Phyllophaga is a very large genus (more than 260 species) of New World scarab beetles in the subfamily Melolonthinae.
genus_notes.phileurus: Phileurus is a genus of rhinoceros beetles in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.gnorimella: Gnorimella is a genus of uncommon scarab beetle in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.canthon: Canthon, the tumblebugs, is a genus of Scarabaeidae or scarab beetles in the superfamily Scarabaeoidea.
genus_notes.euetheola: Euetheola is a genus of rhinoceros beetles in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.trigonopeltastes: Trigonopeltastes is a genus of fruit and flower chafers in the beetle family Scarabaeidae, found in North and Central America.
genus_notes.nipponoserica: Nipponoserica is a genus of May beetles and junebugs in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.dichelonyx: Dichelonyx is a genus of May beetles and junebugs in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.xyloryctes: Xyloryctes is a genus of rhinoceros beetles in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.pseudocanthon: Pseudocanthon is a genus of (formerly canthonini) in the beetle family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.amphimallon: Amphimallon is a genus of beetles of the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.ligyrus: Ligyrus is a genus of beetles in the tribe Pentodontini, from the Americas.
genus_notes.oscarinus: Oscarinus is a genus of scarab beetles in the family Scarabaeidae.
genus_notes.deltochilum: Deltochilum is a genus of Scarabaeidae or scarab beetles in the superfamily Scarabaeoidea.
genus_notes.labarrus: Labarrus is a genus of scarab, stag and bess beetles in the family Aphodiidae.
